resources.string: Decreasing threshold of recognized hand gesture results button
Increasing threshold of recognized hand gesture results button
Decrease the number of threads used
Increase the number of threads used
Click + to add an image or a video to begin running the gesture recognizer.
Cooldown for going to previous song
How fast the response to like/dislike is
Thank you for using Gesture \n Here you will find each gesture supported in this program, and it\'s use for hands free control
The open palm is used to pause/stop media
The side of your hand with your thumb up is used to resume/play media
Two fingers pointing right with your thumb up will move to the next media app
Two fingers pointing right with your thumb down will move to the previous media app
A thumbs up will like or dislike a current song
The right point with your thumb \n up will skip to the next song
The right point with your thumb \n down will reverse to the previous song
pointing up with your index \n will increase the volume
pointing up with your down \n will decrease the volume
